RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd

# Load the data from the CSV file
file_path = '/mnt/data/assistant-Rb9e3RSeoB6A1L96oHPtdZ-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv'
data = pd.read_csv(file_path)

# Display the first few rows of the data to understand its structure
data.head()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Select data for the TRANSPORTATION sector
transportation_data = data[data['sector'] == 'TRANSPORTATION']

# Create a bar chart for operating profit
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.bar(transportation_data['name'], transportation_data['operating_profit'].astype(float), color='skyblue')
plt.xlabel('Company Name')
plt.ylabel('Operating Profit (in millions)')
plt.title('Operating Profit in the Transportation Sector')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()

# Save the chart as an image file
chart_path = '/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_chart.png'
plt.savefig(chart_path)

chart_path

content.text:
I’ve created a bar chart for the operating profit in the Transportation sector. You can download the image using the link below:
